title: worktree merge becomes a safe transaction: --no-commit, abort on conflict/red verify, commit only on green (review P1-2, D2)
action: In skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/worktree-store.mjs mergeFeatureWorktree (advisor conditions folded): staged transaction — capture pre-merge HEAD; git merge --no-ff --no-commit <branch>; handle the 'Already up to date' no-op branch explicitly (no MERGE_HEAD -> report typed no-op, never attempt commit — advisor R7); textual conflict -> git merge --abort + three-part HEAD-unchanged proof (rev-parse HEAD equal + .git/MERGE_HEAD absent + git status --porcelain --untracked-files=no clean — advisor R5) + typed MERGE_CONFLICT saying main untouched; clean merge -> run caller-passed verifyCommand on the merged-but-UNCOMMITTED tree (document in code that verify sees a mid-merge repo: MERGE_HEAD live, changes staged — advisor R7), with the abort executed in a finally/ensure path so a verify crash or timeout can never strand a staged merge; red -> abort + three-part proof + typed MERGE_VERIFY_RED naming the semantic alarm AND stating main was left untouched (supersedes never-rolled-back); green -> git commit (message naming the id), then post-commit guard: git status --porcelain --untracked-files=no MUST be empty, else attach a typed warning that verify mutated tracked files (advisor R4 — the pre/post-commit verify equivalence is backed by this assertion, not assumed); document git revert -m 1 as recovery if a later independent verify reddens. --cleanup strictly post-commit (D4); never on conflict/red/no-op. Update CLI handler text; update worktree-store.mjs:826-828 message. e2e in scripts/test_worktree_cli.mjs: REWORK THE FIXTURE CHAIN (advisor R6 — :802-805 depends on the alarm test leaving mainA/flag.txt flipped; that premise collapses under abort): make the no-cleanup-red case flip its own flag, and audit every mainA reuse for stale premises; replace :544-550 old-contract assertion; add: conflict -> abort + three-part proof + no MERGE_MSG/MERGE_HEAD residue; red verify -> abort + proof; green -> exactly one merge commit incl. ff-possible pair still yielding a true merge commit (--no-ff --no-commit interaction test); verify-mutates-tracked-file case -> typed warning; cleanup only post-commit. DRIFT AUDIT in the same cell (advisor): update docs/specs/worktree-parallelism.md:81-83 (main byte-untouched; no merge commit exists until verify green), skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md:69 Session Scout note, AGENTS.block.md template + rendered AGENTS.md rule 14 rider (staged-then-verified; red aborts), then re-render plugin trees + refresh managed copies + manifest --write. Sync 4-way byte mirrors.

truths: conflict path: main HEAD and index byte-unchanged after abort, no MERGE_HEAD/MERGE_MSG residue, typed MERGE_CONFLICT
red-verify path: aborted, HEAD unchanged, typed MERGE_VERIFY_RED naming the semantic alarm and stating main untouched
green path: exactly one merge commit; ff-possible pair still yields a true merge commit
cleanup runs only after the commit exists; never on conflict/red
old contract prose/tests fully replaced (no assertion or message still claims the merge commit survives a red verify)

verify: node scripts/test_worktree_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_worktree_store.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs

trace.outcome: Worktree merge is now a staged transaction: no-commit stage, abort+three-part main-untouched proof on conflict/red verify, commit only on green with tracked-mutation warning guard, finally-backstopped; old never-rolled-back prose replaced across spec/SKILL/AGENTS; e2e rebuilt 103/103; independent verify green on main d3a7a03
trace.verification_evidence:
# p162-2 — done report (worktree merge staged transaction)

Worker: p162-2-worker (sonnet, isolated harness worktree). Worker commit
`9d4c6be`, merged into main as `d3a7a03` (one generated-manifest conflict,
resolved by regeneration; both workers' bee.mjs regions hunk-merged clean).
2026-07-19.

## What shipped (supersedes the old "never rolled back" contract)
- `mergeFeatureWorktree`: `git merge --no-ff --no-commit`; typed
  `ALREADY_UP_TO_DATE` no-op (no MERGE_HEAD → never commits); conflict and
  red verify both abort + `mainUntouchedProof()` three-part check (HEAD
  unchanged, MERGE_HEAD gone, tracked-clean) before returning typed
  `MERGE_CONFLICT` / `MERGE_VERIFY_RED`; verify runs against the
  merged-but-uncommitted tree (documented: MERGE_HEAD live, changes staged);
  commit only on green; post-commit guard attaches
  `warning.code: 'verify_mutated_tracked_files'` when verify dirtied tracked
  files (advisor R4); `finally`-guarded abort backstops any exception between
  staging and commit (advisor R7); `git revert -m 1` documented as recovery.
- CLI text: "main was left byte-untouched" messaging; ALREADY_UP_TO_DATE
  outcome; warning surfaced.
- Drift audit executed in-feature: worktree-parallelism spec §Returning
  rewritten to the staged-transaction contract; SKILL.md Session Scout note;
  AGENTS.block.md rule 14 rider (16753 B, under budget) + rendered AGENTS.md.
- e2e suite rebuilt: 103 assertions; advisor-R6 fixture chain fixed (each
  red-verify case flips its own flag); three-part-proof assertions;
  ff-eligible pair still yields a 2-parent commit (empirically confirmed in a
  throwaway repo); `mainD` fixture proves the tracked-mutation warning;
  cleanup never fires on no-op/conflict/red.
- 6-way mirrors byte-identical; trees re-rendered; manifest regenerated.

## Verification (fresh command output)
Independent orchestrator re-run on main after merge d3a7a03:
worktree_cli 103/103; worktree_store 22/22; bee_cli 180/0; lib_mirror 4/4;
skill_render 27/0; plugin_distribution 38/0; manifest 354 match; conformance
ALL PASS (doctor fix regression-checked in the same run) → P1622_VERIFY_GREEN.
